films.title: Night Stage
films.description: An actor and a politician start a secret affair and together discover their fetish for having sex in public places. The closer they get to their dream of fame, the more they feel the urge to put themselves at risk.

films.title: Conclave
films.description: After the unexpected death of the Pope, Cardinal Lawrence is tasked with managing the covert and ancient ritual of electing a new one. Sequestered in the Vatican with the Catholic Church’s most powerful leaders until the process is complete, Lawrence finds himself at the center of a conspiracy that …

films.title: Plainclothes
films.description: In 1990s New York, an undercover police officer receives an assignment to lure and arrest gay men. However, he's surprised to discover a scintillating connection with one of his targets. As their secret connection deepens and internal pressure to deliver arrests intensifies, he finds himself torn be…

films.title: Preview: Departures + Q&A
films.description: This screening will be followed by a live-streamed Q&A with lead actor, writer & co-director Lloyd Eyre-Morgan & director Neil Ely.  This is a special preview thanks to Peccadillo.  It's instant chemistry when Benji encounters Jake at an airport departures gate. Their on-going relationship unfolds t…

films.title: Cockroach
films.description: Starring John Cameron Mitchell (Hedwig and the Angry Inch) & Justice Singleton.  A black transgender man plans to exchange sex for top surgery money with an older gay man until his night hook up turns into a hunt for a cockroach.

films.title: Departures
films.description: It's instant chemistry when Benji encounters Jake at an airport departures gate. Their on-going relationship unfolds through intimate trips to Amsterdam, revealing a complex power dynamic.

films.title: Departures + Cockroach
films.description: This screening will begin with the hilarious new short film Cockroach from Justice Singleton.  Cockroach (22 mins)  A black transgender man plans to exchange sex for top surgery money with an older gay man (John Cameron Mitchell) until his late-night hook up turns into a hunt for a cockroach.  Depar…

films.title: Rains Over Babel
films.description: In a retro-futuristic, tropical-punk twist on Dante’s Inferno, a group of misfits converges at Babel, a legendary dive bar that doubles as purgatory, where La Flaca—the city’s Grim Reaper—presides. Here, souls gamble years of their lives with her, daring to outwit Death Herself.

films.title: Cockroach + Q&A
films.description: This screening will be followed by a live-streamed Q&A with writer, director and actor Justice Singleton.  A black transgender man plans to exchange sex for top surgery money with an older gay man until his night hook up turns into a hunt for a cockroach who inspires him to open his heart and conque…

films.title: The Male Gaze: Heavenly Creatures
films.description: NQV Media and The Arzner present the latest Male Gaze gay short film collection with Heavenly Creatures, a queer quartet of films that explore faith and passion.  Forgive them, father, for these boys have sinned. Witness how the power of God works in mysterious ways, from sexual tension high up in t…

films.title: The Handmaiden
films.description: Kicking off our Lesbian Visibility Week.  1930s Korea, in the period of Japanese occupation, a new girl, Sookee, is hired as a handmaiden to a Japanese heiress, Hideko, who lives a secluded life on a large countryside estate with her domineering Uncle Kouzuki. But the maid has a secret. She is a pic…

films.title: D.E.B.S.
films.description: Part of our Lesbian Visibility Week.  The star of a team of teenage crime fighters falls for the alluring villainess she must bring to justice.

films.title: Rosie Turner Q&A
films.description: Please note that this Q&A will start at 18:00.  Part of our Lesbian Visibility Week.  Join Rosie Turner, author of Girlfriend Material and director Lucy Davidson for a conversation around sex, relationships, labels and the messy grey areas of love.

films.title: Exclusive Preview: Love Me Tender
films.description: Part of our Lesbian Visibility Week.  Thanks to Peccadillo, we have been given an exclusive preview of Love Me Tender starring Vicky Krieps to celebrate Lesbian Visibility Week.  At the end of summer, Clémence tells her ex-husband that she’s had relationships with women. Her life is turned upside do…

films.title: Lesbian Visibility: Comedy Shorts
films.description: Part of our Lesbian Visibility Week.  This is a collection of 3 lesbian comedy short films to celebrate Lesbian Visibility Week.

films.title: UK Premiere: The Activist + Q&A
films.description: This premiere screening will be followed by an in-person Q&A with actors Vaslov Goom and Simas Kuliešius, director Romas Zabarauskas, and co-writer Marc David Jacobs. films.title: Mother Mary
films.description: Long-buried wounds rise to the surface when iconic pop star Mother Mary reunites with her estranged best friend and former costume designer Sam Anselm on the eve of her comeback performance.

films.title: The Activist
films.description: Saturday's screening at 16:30 will be introduced by actor Vaslov Goom and director Romas Zabarauskas.  The Arzner is the only UK cinema to be screening The Activist. films.title: Lesbian Visibility: Animated Shorts
films.description: Part of our Lesbian Visibility Week.  This is a collection of lesbian animated short films to celebrate Lesbian Visibility Week.

films.title: Mother Mary + Intro from Femmi
films.description: This screening will be introduced by Femmi, the internationally renowned pop sensation!  Long-buried wounds rise to the surface when iconic pop star Mother Mary reunites with her estranged best friend and former costume designer Sam Anselm on the eve of her comeback performance.

films.title: Fetish Friendly: Departures
films.description: Chains, whips, leather, whatever you desire are all welcome to this screening. This is a non-judgmental space & a screening for people to express themselves freely. films.title: O.W.L (Short Films)
films.description: Part of our Lesbian Visibility Week.  The acronym O.W.L stands for Older Wiser Lesbian in the LGBTQ+ community.  For our O.W.L event, we are screening two short films about aging lesbians:  A Great Ride (33 mins)  "A Great Ride" is a 30-minute documentary about lesbians aging with dynamism and zest …

films.title: Late Night: Codependent Lesbian Space Alien Seeks Same
films.description: Part of our Lesbian Visibility Week.  This is a late-night screening that is strictly for people aged 18 and over. Tickets are just £8!  The adventures of lesbian space aliens on the planet Earth, and the story of the romance between Jane, a shy greeting card store employee, and Zoinx, the woman Jan…

films.title: Lesbian Visibility Day Pass
films.description: Purchase a Lesbian Visibility Day Pass in our Member's page. Save 25% on all tickets for Lesbian Visibility Day.  This pass requires you to select your seat still. Buying a pass DOES NOT automatically guarantee a seat.  Once a day pass is bought, please log-in to your account and "purchase" your sea…

films.title: Lesbian Visibility Day: Short Films
films.description: Part of our Lesbian Visibility Day.  This is a collection of short films to kick off our Lesbian Visibility Day celebrations.

films.title: Lesbian Visibility Day: Dance, Girl, Dance + Intro on Dorothy Arzner
films.description: Part of our Lesbian Visibility Day.  This screening will be introduced by film curator Caroline Cassin with a talk on the pioneering lesbian filmmaker Dorothy Arzner (who we're named after).  Judy O'Brien (Maureen O' Hara) is an aspiring ballerina in a dance troupe. Also in the company is Bubbles (L…

films.title: Lesbian Visibility Day: Skiff Exclusive Preview
films.description: Part of Lesbian Visibility Day.  Fifteen-year-old Malou is struggling with herself; while her mother is mostly absent and her rowing teammates bully her, the one person she can rely on is her brother Max. When Malou develops feelings for Max’s girlfriend Nouria, her life is dragged in an unstoppable…

films.title: Lesbian Visibility Day: Montreal, ma belle Preview + Director Q&A
films.description: Part of our Lesbian Visibility Day.  This is an exclusive preview screening that will be followed by a Q&A with writer & director Xiaodan He. films.title: Lesbian Visibility Day: Mother Mary + Intro
films.description: Part of our Lesbian Visibility Day  Long-buried wounds rise to the surface when iconic pop star Mother Mary reunites with her estranged best friend and former costume designer Sam Anselm on the eve of her comeback performance.

films.title: UK Premiere: Ultimate Boys Trip + Special Intro
films.description: This exclusive premiere is in partnership with OUTtv. This screening will have an extended pre-recorded intro from Joey Mills, Boomer Banks and Max Konnor. films.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2
films.description: Miranda Priestly navigates her career amid the decline of traditional magazine publishing. She faces off against Emily Charlton, her one-time assistant, now a high-powered executive for a luxury group, with advertising dollars that Priestly desperately needs.

films.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 + Intro
films.description: Miranda Priestly navigates her career amid the decline of traditional magazine publishing. She faces off against Emily Charlton, her one-time assistant, now a high-powered executive for a luxury group, with advertising dollars that Priestly desperately needs.

films.title: Adults Only: The Devil Wears Prada 2
films.description: This screening is strictly for people aged 18 and over.  Miranda Priestly navigates her career amid the decline of traditional magazine publishing. She faces off against Emily Charlton, her one-time assistant, now a high-powered executive for a luxury group, with advertising dollars that Priestly de…

films.title: Dog-Friendly: The Devil Wears Prada 2

films.title: The Climb: Meningitis Research Foundation Fundraiser
films.description: The Climb is a collection of LGBTQ+ short films that deal with themes of resilience and facing tough challenges. All ticket sales will be donated to Meningitis Research Foundation.  This screening will be hosted by Rebecca Row. Rebecca will be undertaking a Mt. Everest Trek Challenge to raise money …

films.title: Sunset Boulevard + Intro from Norma Desperate
films.description: This screening will be introduced by Norma Desperate; London's not so silent movie star.  A screenwriter develops a dangerous relationship with a faded film star determined to make a triumphant return.

films.title: LGBTQ+ Shorts & Stand-Up
films.description: Love stand-up? Love cinema? Why choose!  Catch hilarious comedy short films starring or made by stand-up comedians, with performances from the very same actors you'll see on screen. Comedian Caitlin Powell will present three fantastic stand-ups and short films, including  Slag-Offers starring Kate B…

films.title: Madfabulous
films.description: In the late 19th century, Henry Cyril Paget is the flamboyant fifth Marquess of Anglesey who smashed society’s notions of class, gender and decorum, squandering a multimillion fortune before his heartbreaking untimely death.

films.title: Pink Narcissus (4K Restoration) + Extended Intro
films.description: Celebrate Pride Month with this newly restored piece of queer cinema history!  This screening will begin with a pre - recorded extended introduction from the UCLA Film and Television Archive’s Motion Picture Curator Todd Wiener. The work of artist and photographer James Bidgood, Pink Narcissus is a …

films.title: The Powerpuff Girls Movie + Intro from Nyongbella
films.description: This screening will be introduced by Nyongbella (Ru Paul's Drag Race UK, S7).  After destroying the city of Townsville in a game of tag, a trio of superpowered little girls must redeem themselves by stopping a vengeful monkey's plot for world domination.

films.title: brat summer: Charli XCX Marathon
films.description: Celebrate the end of brat summer with a Charli XCX movie marathon.  There will be surprises, music videos, goodies, prizes, and more...  If you're a 365 party girl, then this is an event you DO NOT want to miss!!!
